# About MyAlpha

MyAlpha is an independent architecture and technology advisory practice led by **Paul Serrao**, specialising in financial services, trading systems, wealth platforms, and data architecture.

Paul has delivered architecture and engineering outcomes across trading, wealth, digital advice, data platforms, FIX connectivity, and enterprise transformation. Known for simplifying complexity, aligning stakeholders, and delivering architectures that work in the real world.

MyAlpha exists to help organisations move from legacy constraints to modern, scalable, secure architectures that support growth.
